species.citation: (Blume) C.Presl , Abh. Königl. Böhm. Ges. Wiss., 5th Ser. 6 (1851) 549 ; Pescuela et al., PJS 153 (2024) 664; ≡ Polypodium bicuspe Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1828) 125.
species.distribution: Borneo, China, Japan, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Abra, Apayao, Aurora (photos), Bataan, Benguet, Ilocos Norte, Isabela, Kalinga, Laguna, Nueva Vizcaya (photos), Pampanga, Quezon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao Oriental (photos), Davao del Sur, Misamis Oriental, Sarangani, Zamboanga del Sur, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY.

BATAN, BILIRAN, CAMIGUIN, CEBU, DINAGAT (photos), LEYTE, LUZON: Abra (photos), Albay, Apayao, Aurora, Bataan, Batangas, Benguet, Cagayan, Camarines Norte, Camarines Sur, Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Isabela, Kalinga, Laguna, Mountain Province, NCR, Nueva Vizcaya, Pampanga, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao Oriental, Davao del Norte, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Misamis Occidental, Misamis Oriental, Sarangani, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY, SAMAR, SIBUYAN.
